prevalence.trend: decreasing in Western EU, stable in Eastern EU

riskFactors: Biomass fuel exposure in rural areas
vulnerablePopulations: Residents in Eastern EU with high smoking rates
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: GOLD criteria, spirometry with post-bronchodilator FEV1/FVC <0.70

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: spirometry widely available in primary care

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ERS/GOLD guidelines, spirometry mandatory for diagnosis
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: LABA/LAMA combinations, ICS/LABA for exacerbations, pulmonary rehabilitation, smoking cessation programs
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Persistent smoking in Eastern Europe, aging population, underdiagnosis despite high spirometry access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Comprehensive ERS/GOLD guidelines, high spirometry availability, pulmonary rehabilitation programs, smoking cessation support
